title: striga pubiflora var. zanzibarensis
intro: Striga pubiflora var. zanzibarensis is a variety of the Striga pubiflora plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the broomrape family, Orobanchaceae. The Striga pubiflora var. zanzibarensis plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, where its medicinal properties include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a treatment for wounds and burns. Herbal preparations of Striga pubiflora var. zanzibarensis plant typically involve drying and powdering the leaves or roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or topical applications.
